enumerability.rationale: The fixture covers a bounded ADLC validator surface with two explicit dimensions and documented exclusions.

capability_claims.claim: ADLC can admit a Kitchen Loop style coverage claim only when the declared surface is bounded and has oracle-backed scenarios.
capability_claims.scope: Local schema and CLI fixture validation.
limitations: Does not prove production product behavior.

success_criteria.description: Every supported combination has an oracle ref.

unsupported_states.reason: Coverage-exhaustion claims without independent truth are circular.

redaction_posture: Fixtures contain no secrets and only local ADLC paths.
